matches.lesson: Medical RCTs should include statistician and ethicist roles. The statistician covers numeric consistency and missing-data assumptions; the ethicist covers registration, IRB, COI, data protection, and participant protection.
high_frequency_issues: LOCF plus asymmetric dropout without sensitivity analysis
primary endpoint confidence interval and p-value inconsistency
multiple secondary endpoints without multiplicity correction

redaction_note: Credentials, platform account state, live failure payloads, and node-local identifiers are excluded from this public example.
